scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n dice,dnd,hero,inv,act,room,shd,rnd,enm,api,vite -c magenta,cyan,green,blue,red,magenta,cyan,blue,red,yellow,white "npm run dev -w @wow/dice-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/dnd-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/hero-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/inventory-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/action-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/room-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/shade-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/render-service" "npm run dev -w @wow/enemy-service" "node packages/wow/server.cjs" "npm run dev -w wow"
